; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @InputKt_reverse
define i32 @InputKt_reverse(i32 %arg0) {
entry:
  %merge_2 = alloca i32
  %merge_4 = alloca i32
  store i32 %arg0, ptr %merge_2
  %t0 = add i32 0, 0
  store i32 %t0, ptr %merge_4
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t1 = load i32, ptr %merge_2
  %t2 = add i32 0, 0
  %t3 = icmp sgt i32 %t1, %t2
  br i1 %t3, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  %t4 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  %t5 = add i32 0, 10
  %t6 = mul i32 %t4, %t5
  %t7 = load i32, ptr %merge_2
  %t8 = add i32 0, 10
  %t9 = srem i32 %t7, %t8
  %t10 = add i32 %t6, %t9
  store i32 %t10, ptr %merge_4
  %t11 = load i32, ptr %merge_2
  %t12 = add i32 0, 10
  %t13 = sdiv i32 %t11, %t12
  store i32 %t13, ptr %merge_2
  br label %bb1
bb3:
  %t14 = load i32, ptr %merge_4
  ret i32 %t14
}

; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 12345
  %t1 = call i32 @InputKt_reverse(i32 %t0)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t1)
  %t3 = add i32 0, 100
  %t4 = call i32 @InputKt_reverse(i32 %t3)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t4)
  %t6 = add i32 0, 7
  %t7 = call i32 @InputKt_reverse(i32 %t6)
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t7)
  ret i32 0
}
